Net revenue for fiscal 2022 was $394,328 million, an increase of 8% compared with the prior year. The growth was driven by strong demand in the Services segment and favorable product pricing. Services revenue increased 14% year over year to $78,129 million, while product revenue grew 6%. Gross margin expanded by 130 basis points to 43.3%, reflecting manufacturing efficiencies and a richer revenue mix. Operating expenses increased 14% as the company invested in research and development and marketing. Operating income rose 9% versus the prior fiscal year. The company returned $89 billion to shareholders through dividends and buybacks during the year. Management expects continued investment in capacity and new product categories during fiscal 2023, and liquidity remains strong with sufficient cash to fund operations.
